channel.title: The Gaming Project on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in The Gaming Project on Tech Tracker

item.title: The Gaming Project - India's 1st cloud platform to play PC games on mobile.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-2RULyW9smR8/YhZoI9ltBGI/AAAAAAAAJTs/RzbEbmSuDy8ekk13bszMLoSaQPIoUpmoACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1645635612072465-0.png" alt=""> Smartphones are not capable to play and support PC games due to mobile software and hardware limitations, however due to cloud technology now it’s possible to play PC games on any device, but you need to have fast internet connection with strong ping for flawless experience. Cloud games are not new, people from around the world started playing cloud games on their smartphones from past few years, but alot of india people don’t know about cloud games due to lack of awareness on this technology, and most cloud gaming platform require premium subscription because of this people not showing interest in cloud games.
